data.label: Chromium Webview
data.description: WebView 组件基于 Chromium 开源项目。WebView 与 Android 版 Chrome 共用相同的渲染引擎，因此 WebView 和 Chrome 之间的渲染应保持一致。

data.label: Chromium Webview
data.description: The WebView component is based on the Chromium open-source project. WebView and Chrome for Android share the same rendering engine, so rendering should remain consistent between WebView and Chrome.
